title: hyoscyamus grandiflorus
intro: Hyoscyamus grandiflorus, also known as the Dyer's Jasmine or Apple of Sodom, is a plant species in the nightshade family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Hyoscyamus grandiflorus include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. In herbal preparations, Hyoscyamus grandiflorus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
